languages.text: "Зверья почти нет, зато всяких растений — на любой вкус и цвет. И все это человека пытается убить. Погонщица-то, по сути, тоже дерево, ну или цветок, только самый поганый".
"There are virtually no animals, but every type of plant life imaginable. And all of them try to kill humans. The Drover is just another tree, or a flower, but the nastiest of them."
languages.original_text: "Зверья почти нет, зато всяких растений — на любой вкус и цвет. И все это человека пытается убить. Погонщица-то, по сути, тоже дерево, ну или цветок, только самый поганый".

traits.locale_text: "There is virtually no wildlife, but every manner of plant life imaginable. And all of them are trying to kill humans. The Drover is just another tree, or a flower, but the cursed breed of it."
"There are virtually no animals, but every type of plant life imaginable. And all of them try to kill humans. The Drover is just another tree, or a flower, but the nastiest of them."

"There is virtually no wildlife to speak of here, but every kind of plant you can imagine. And all of them are trying to kill humans. The Drover is just another flower, in essence. Only the stupidest flower of them all. There are some ruins on the planet as well, non-human ones. But we don't go there much. Ask Dunawski, she's known for her visits to the ruins."
"There is virtually no wildlife, but every manner of plant life imaginable. And all of them are trying to kill humans. The Drover is just another tree, or a flower, but the cursed breed of it."
"There are virtually no animals, but every type of plant life imaginable. And all of them try to kill humans. The Drover is just another tree, or a flower, but the nastiest of them."
"There are virtually no animals, but every type of plant life imaginable. And all of them try to kill humans. The Drover is just another tree, or a flower, but the nastiest of them."

languages.text: 「ここには野生動物はほとんどいませんが、想像できるあらゆる種類の植物があります。そして、すべてが人間を殺そうとしています。ドローバーは、本質的にはただの花です。ただ、最も愚かな花です。この惑星には、人間ではない遺跡もあります。でも、私たちはあまり行かないです。ダナウスキーに聞いてみてください。彼女は遺跡を訪れることで知られています」
languages.original_text: "There is virtually no wildlife to speak of here, but every kind of plant you can imagine. And all of them are trying to kill humans. The Drover is just another flower, in essence. Only the stupidest flower of them all. There are some ruins on the planet as well, non-human ones. But we don't go there much. Ask Dunawski, she's known for her visits to the ruins."

traits.locale_text: 「ここには野生動物はほとんどいませんが、想像できるあらゆる種類の植物があります。そして、すべてが人間を殺そうとしています。ドローバーは、本質的にはただの花です。ただ、最も愚かな花です。この惑星には、人間ではない遺跡もあります。でも、私たちはあまり行かないです。ダナウスキーに聞いてみてください。彼女は遺跡を訪れることで知られています。」

languages.text: « Si la faune est presque inexistante dans ce monde, on y trouve tous les types de plantes possibles et imaginables, avec un point commun : elles essaient toutes de nous tuer. Le Chasseur est un arbre parmi tant d'autres, ou une fleur, mais la plus agressive de toutes. »
languages.original_text: "There are virtually no animals, but every type of plant life imaginable. And all of them try to kill humans. The Drover is just another tree, or a flower, but the nastiest of them."

traits.locale_text: « Si la faune est presque inexistante dans ce monde, on y trouve tous les types de plantes possibles et imaginables, avec un point commun : elles essaient toutes de nous tuer. Le Chasseur est un arbre parmi tant d'autres, ou une fleur, mais la plus agressive de toutes. »

languages.text: "Neredeyse hiç hayvan yok ama akla gelebilecek her türlü bitki mevcut. Hepsi insanları öldürmeye çalışıyor. Çoban da ağaçlardan veya çiçeklerden farksız, gerçi en iğrençleri o."
languages.original_text: "There are virtually no animals, but every type of plant life imaginable. And all of them try to kill humans. The Drover is just another tree, or a flower, but the nastiest of them."

traits.locale_text: "Neredeyse hiç hayvan yok ama akla gelebilecek her türlü bitki mevcut. Hepsi insanları öldürmeye çalışıyor. Çoban da ağaçlardan veya çiçeklerden farksız, gerçi en iğrençleri o."

languages.text: «Apenas hay animales aquí, pero plantas tenemos todas las que se pueda imaginar. Y todas ellas quieren matarnos. El Pastor es un árbol más, o quizá una flor, pero sin duda es el más peligroso de todos».
languages.original_text: "There are virtually no animals, but every type of plant life imaginable. And all of them try to kill humans. The Drover is just another tree, or a flower, but the nastiest of them."

traits.locale_text: «Apenas hay animales aquí, pero plantas tenemos todas las que se pueda imaginar. Y todas ellas quieren matarnos. El Pastor es un árbol más, o quizá una flor, pero sin duda es el más peligroso de todos».

languages.text: “这里几乎没有动物，但有您能想象到的任何植物，且每一种都想致人死地。拒生花不过是一种树，或是一种花，但却是最要命的那种。”
languages.original_text: "There are virtually no animals, but every type of plant life imaginable. And all of them try to kill humans. The Drover is just another tree, or a flower, but the nastiest of them."

traits.locale_text: “这里几乎没有动物，但有您能想象到的任何植物，且每一种都想致人死地。拒生花不过是一种树，或是一种花，但却是最要命的那种。”

languages.text: "Es gibt praktisch keine Tiere, aber jede erdenkliche Form von pflanzlichem Leben. Und sämtliche Pflanzen töten Menschen! Der Treiber ist auch nur ein Baum oder eine Blume, aber er ist der Übelste von allen."
languages.original_text: "There are virtually no animals, but every type of plant life imaginable. And all of them try to kill humans. The Drover is just another tree, or a flower, but the nastiest of them."

traits.locale_text: "Es gibt praktisch keine Tiere, aber jede erdenkliche Form von pflanzlichem Leben. Und sämtliche Pflanzen töten Menschen! Der Treiber ist auch nur ein Baum oder eine Blume, aber er ist der Übelste von allen."
